reachability_artifacts: built sworn notifications list output and exit code showing pending, retry_wait, delivered, and dead records from a live repository-local database
built sworn notifications replay invocation proving the delivery is requeued while operation events and Baton status revisions remain unchanged
process-kill capture proving an expired lease is recovered and eventually delivered once the dispatcher restarts

effort_complexity.rationale: See spec.json; implementer must confirm schema, lease, and transaction boundaries against live S04 output before design review.

release_benefit: A SwornAgent operator can trust a recoverable autonomous release loop, receive durable attention pages, and monitor or safely control it from a mobile web board.

positive_scenarios: A blocked loop transaction creates one pending notification per configured destination.
A transient delivery failure becomes retry_wait and succeeds after restart.
An operator inspects and replays a dead delivery without changing loop state.
negative_scenarios: Outbox insertion failure prevents an optimistic terminal PASS.
Concurrent dispatchers cannot hold the same live lease.
Secret values and worktree paths never appear in storage, output, or errors.
validation.benefit_hypothesis: Making notification intent durable before network delivery turns paging from a best-effort side effect into inspectable operational evidence.

design_decisions.choice: Store notification envelopes and attempts in the existing repository-local SQLite operations database.
design_decisions.rationale: It preserves one-binary operation, transactional event linkage, cross-process leases, and crash recovery without adding infrastructure.

design_decisions.choice: Guarantee at-least-once delivery with stable envelope IDs and idempotent destination projections.
design_decisions.rationale: Network exactly-once cannot be promised, but durable IDs and replay-safe providers make duplicates observable and suppressible.

design_decisions.choice: Keep notification replay structurally incapable of invoking operation commands.
design_decisions.rationale: A transport retry must never repeat a loop mutation.
